WildBanditoRules.Rule1: Wild Bandito is a 5-reel, 4-row video slot featuring Wild symbol transformation and free spins with increasing multiplier.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{1024} ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{minChip} and %{maxChip} will be replaced by multiplier, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{1024} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8.

WildBanditoRules.Rule3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
WildBanditoRules.Rule4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
WildBanditoRules.Rule5: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

WildBanditoFeatures.GoldFrameExplain1: During any spins, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3 and/or 4 may appear in gold.
WildBanditoFeatures.GoldFrameExplain2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol(s).
WildBanditoFeatures.FreeSpinExplain1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 12 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
WildBanditoFeatures.FreeSpinExplain2: During the Free Spins Feature, all symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reel 3 will appear in gold.
WildBanditoFeatures.FreeSpinExplain3: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
WildBanditoFeatures.FreeSpinExplain4: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1 .

WildBanditoCommonRule.WildExplanation1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
WildBanditoCommonRule.WildExplanation2: Gold Framed symbols appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.

WildBanditoMultiplier.MultiplierExplain1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
WildBanditoMultiplier.MultiplierExplain2: During any spins, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1 .
